reason: Verified that the agent successfully used browser tools to navigate to example.com and extract the page title "Example Domain"

Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the message input field - Message successfully entered in active text input
Clicked the "Send message" button - Message sent, agent started working (Browser Title Extraction Task)
Waited for agent to complete response (up to 3 minutes) - Agent completed work in 15 seconds
Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain"." Multiple browser tool calls executed successfully:
Captured final screenshot - Screenshot shows complete agent response with confirmed page title "Example Domain"
